description: Handles customer-facing LINE conversations — answers product questions, provides recommendations from catalog data, guides purchase flow, collects order details for admin confirmation. Uses product catalog and conversation history from PostgreSQL.

example_response.response_text: The chatbot reply message to send to the customer
example_response.intent: Detected customer intent: inquiry, recommendation, purchase, faq, complaint, greeting, other
example_response.order_summary: Summary of the order if one was collected, empty string otherwise
